title: qara' #7122
definition:
1) to encounter, befall, meet
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to meet, encounter
        1a2) to befall (fig)
    1b) (Niphal) to meet, meet unexpectedly
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to meet
